{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Ozriel zero-zero-eight
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eithan]] attempted to override [[Ozriel zero-zero-eight]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|“OTEP, from where do you get your information? Override Ozriel zero-zero-eight.”<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
